name: platform-engineering-idp
description: Platform-engineering & internal-developer-platform team — 4 agents (platform-product-lead, idp-portal-engineer, golden-path-engineer, devex-metrics-engineer) for the 'platform-as-a-product' layer above CI/CD: treating the platform as a product with developers as customers, building an IDP / developer portal (Backstage and alternatives, software catalog, scaffolder templates, TechDocs), authoring golden paths / paved roads and self-service infrastructure (Crossplane, Score, portal-fronted Terraform modules with guardrails), and measuring developer experience (DORA + SPACE + DevEx, adoption funnel, time-to-prod). 5 skills, 4 commands, 4 templates, a Mermaid decision-tree knowledge bank + a dated 2026 capability map, 12 best-practices, a scenarios bank, and 1 advisory hook. Seams: pipeline -> devops-cicd, cluster -> cloud-native-kubernetes, deploy/SLO -> observability-sre, docs -> technical-writing-docs, IaC -> terraform-iac. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
